subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast quaffed the nectar of true understanding! Hearken unto that whereunto the All-Merciful doth summon thee from this Most Holy Sanctuary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب رحیق العرفان ان استمع ما یدعوک به الرحمن من هذا المقر الاقدس
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
